entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Long-term shifts in temperatures and weather patterns that impact global agriculture

entities.name: GLOBAL AGRICULTURE
entities.description: The worldwide system of crop and livestock production

entities.name: VEGETABLES
entities.description: Agricultural crops grown for human consumption that require resilience to heat

entities.name: HEAT STRESS
entities.description: High-temperature conditions that negatively affect plant biochemical processes, quality, and yield

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of harvestable agricultural product produced

entities.name: QUALITY
entities.description: The characteristics and standards of the vegetable produce

entities.name: BIOCHEMICAL AND MOLECULAR PROCESSES
entities.description: The internal biological mechanisms of plants affected by temperature increases

entities.name: CLIMATE RESILIENCE
entities.description: The ability of crops to maintain productivity under adverse climate conditions

entities.name: OMICS TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: High-throughput technologies including genomics, transcriptomics, proteomics, and metabolomics used to study biological pathways

entities.name: GENOMICS
entities.description: The study of the complete set of DNA within an organism

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTOMICS
entities.description: The study of the complete set of RNA transcripts produced by the genome

entities.name: METABOLOMICS
entities.description: The study of small molecule metabolites

entities.name: GENOMICS-ASSISTED BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding approach that uses genomic information to improve crop selection

entities.name: GENE EDITING
entities.description: A technique used to make precise changes to the DNA of a crop

entities.name: SPEED BREEDING
entities.description: A technique used to accelerate the generation cycle of crops

entities.name: HUMANS
entities.description: The consumers of vegetable crops whose increasing population increases demand for yield
